name: Impostor Flood
description:
A impostor evaluator sim inspired by No I’m not a Human, That’s not my neighbor, etc. The world is flooding and you must choose who to let into your manor and not! Evaluate and question everyone carefully!

The Guests can be safe humans or unnatural creatures masquerading as them! There’s an enormous variety of creatures and different methods of killing for game overs!

Outside the evaluations, interact with your guests and build relationships as you uncover more about them and their pasts as well as the crazy mysteries going on with the apocalypse.

Remastered Version
creator: Tevin Anarchy
